description: Shared FE/BE oracle for role assignment. Both Vitest (frontend) and pytest (backend) load this file and verify their respective computeRole / _compute_role implementations agree on the expected role for every input vector. Cases are generated by transforming the canonical role centroids from z-space to raw IPIP-NEO 1-5 scale via raw = z * sd + mean. Adding a new case requires running the canonical implementation once to determine expected_role and committing the result here. Removing a case is allowed only with reviewer approval.

norm_assumptions.comment: These values must match BOTH src/utils/role-scoring.js (NORM_MEAN, NORM_SD) AND api/scoring.py (_NORM). Tests below verify this. If they diverge, fix the codebase, do not edit this file in isolation.

cases.description: Centroid of R01 must self-map to R01
Centroid of R02 must self-map to R02
Centroid of R03 must self-map to R03
Centroid of R04 must self-map to R04
Centroid of R05 must self-map to R05
Centroid of R06 must self-map to R06
Centroid of R07 must self-map to R07. Regression guard for audit-v2 finding V1 (BE diverged on C and N).
Centroid of R08 must self-map to R08
Centroid of R09 must self-map to R09
Centroid of R10 must self-map to R10
Centroid of R11 must self-map to R11
Centroid of R12 must self-map to R12
